feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: I am ashamed of my ancestors because they failed to kill enough Yankees. We shou…
entry.content: I am ashamed of my ancestors because they failed to kill enough Yankees. We should've killed millions, but we only got 400,000. Hopefully the generation of my sons will be the one that destroys the vile Yankee race.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Does content that has been adapted in official material undervalue fan interpret…
entry.content: Does content that has been adapted in official material undervalue fan interpretations? Even if those fanworks have existed for longer than the official version? And should those fanworks influence the official take in some way? Like when a new game touches the same subjects a past fangame did.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Tony wears the same watch as the president. Also kind of weird because this was …
entry.content: Tony wears the same watch as the president. Also kind of weird because this was around/before the retardedly big watch fad so it's a pretty small case for someone as big as Tony. Though prior to the 90s/2000s that would have been a common watch size since fashionable watches were smaller. Like Connery wears smaller case size watches than Brosnan or Craig in James Bond films

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Toy Story 5
entry.content: Honestly, it's probably a good thing we saw a lot less of Woody in this movie. He represents a different..."era". Jessie is much better and funnier character than that old boomer. And so what they didn't feature "You’ve Got a Friend in Me” in the actual movie. The new original Taylor Swift song CLEARS that boring old song. The future is female afterall.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Avatar
entry.content: Why does Kyoshi show up so often in the live action show? In the animated series she gets like 2 minutes of screentime spread over 3 seasons because she's not really relevant to the plot, Roku is, but in the live action series she shows up all the time, to the point they gave one of Roku's scenes to Kyoshi instead.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: How the fuck do they have 10mm pistols in fallout? Isn't the lore that the bombs…
entry.content: How the fuck do they have 10mm pistols in fallout? Isn't the lore that the bombs dropped in the 1950s? .44 mag didn't get produced until 1956. 10mm was invented in like the late 80/early 90s due to the 1986 Miami Dade FBI shoot out. Was there a shootout in one of the vaults? Don't they also have Marlin 1895 rifles? That's also pretty silly because the current marlin 1895s came out in the 1970s after having not been produced for like 50 years and the ones in the game are the new models. Like the

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Projector vs SmartTv debate
entry.content: I've always wondered why do many home theater setups have a TV instead of a projector..I really want to understand why? I'm eyeing 133" inch screen + Benq W4100i but I was suggested to go rather with 100 inch mini led instead. (Similar cost) Projector screen is 77% larger area than TV, Projector streams have higher resolution and a constantly higher framerate, easy of use, portability among many other advantages. What's going for a smarttv other than the fact that it doesn't need a dark room? (

entry.title: /g/ Technology: CERN
entry.content: What did sex feel like before 2012 before CERN's Large Hadron Collider screwed everything up and put us in this version of reality, existence, and events we're in now? Because I was born in 2006 and am still a virgin to this day so I wouldn't know either way. I mean, you didn't hear people before 2012 calling sex "overrated" like you do now (which I take it to mean pleasure and sensation wise) so obviously something changed and not for the better.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why has x86's equivalent of big.LITTLE been such a shitshow?
entry.content: 15-watt business laptops now ship with 2P/8E core CPUs. it's rather petty, since most smartphones will have 2P/4E (apple) or 4P/4E (android SoC vendors). bizarre since the old i7-8650U did fine with 4 cores total.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: on the funeral industry-
entry.content: Caskets, Urns can be marked up by multiples. The decay of a deceased person adds time pressure. There are so many choices, add ons, the pressure to not "cheap out". This is the last thing you can do for your loved one, etc. Someone who has just dealt with the death of their parent, or spouse, very likely has little knowledge how finances in funeral matters should be. Meaning... If you let a bunch of Corporations and Private Equity firms buy up local funeral homes, you shouldn't be surprised if t

entry.title: /news/ News: news
entry.content: Hello everyone on 4chan. Since I was a kid, I've heard stories about you all, and this time my country (Venezuela) is experiencing a national emergency due to an earthquake that destroyed a large part of the most populated area of the country. The government didn't act until 72 hours later, and many of its political leaders have been trying to steal the credit of the people, attempting to steal donations and more. I'm going to attach all the evidence I can. We really need help, even if it's just

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: today i am removing the tarnish from my smaller silverplate i dont have many ite…
entry.content: today i am removing the tarnish from my smaller silverplate i dont have many items. Silverware is fine, my serving dishes are too large, but I have various small pitcher-like objects and a small bowl and i picked one creamer pitcher up today whilst garage saleing that is in particularly poor condition. It had a sticker on it saying $10 but that sticker had been on it for so long that it prevented tarnishing, just on that spot the sticker occupied. I don't want to have some weird shiny circle on

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: When did 4chan become so racist?
entry.content: When I was a teenager, people on 4chan liked Fresh Prince of Bel-Air and Tay Zonday the Chocolate Rain guy. People on this site would say nigger all the time and post Hitler memes but it was a joke and not serious. ... but this site was a site about anime even before it was a meme site. Statistically, every race of people love anime almost equally. Men and women tend to like different anime genres (Women prefer slice of life or romance. Men prefer other genres.) but white men and black men like

entry.title: /int/ International: How do I move to Kent?
entry.content: I live in Teesside but I was born in Kent and I am culturally and genetically a Southern Englishman, I want to go back down south but I cannot as I'm too poor and I was only forced to move up north when I was 11 by my parents. I miss the south and I hate the north, I don't like there accents and I hate all the chavs, smackheads, football hooligans, lads and Pakis. I feel alienated like I don't belong. Please help me get to my native homeland.

entry.title: /int/ International: >86-year-old woman lost 180.000 euros in a phone scam, she was told the country …
entry.content: >86-year-old woman lost 180.000 euros in a phone scam, she was told the country was about to change currency >As the elderly woman reported, she received a phone call from an unknown man who introduced himself to her as an accountant, who convinced her that an immediate change of currency was imminent, corresponding to the transition from the drachma to the euro, and that she should replace the banknotes in her possession > They then asked her to collect all the money she had in her house, put i

entry.title: /b/ Random: AMA - Genius Edition
entry.content: So I got professionally tested a few years back. Scored in the 99.9th percentile. Mensa keeps sending me letters. I can do complex calculus in my head, I taught myself three programming languages by age 14, and I can see the logical flaws in every movie plot within the first 5 minutes. And you know what it's gotten me? Absolutely fucking nothing except crippling loneliness, crippling anxiety, and a front-row seat to how staggeringly stupid the average person is. I'm 26, I work a dead-end remote
